chartLegends.readinessTrend: Shows athlete readiness percentage over time. Higher values indicate better recovery and mental readiness.
chartLegends.complianceRate: Percentage of athletes who completed RPE reports. Essential for workload tracking and injury prevention.
chartLegends.acwrDistribution: ACWR (Acute:Chronic Workload Ratio) values. Green < 1.3 = Safe, Yellow 1.3-1.5 = Warning, Red > 1.5 = Critical injury risk.
chartLegends.teamHealth: Distribution of athlete health status. Safe = Low injury risk, Warning = Monitoring required.
chartLegends.radarComparison: Blue line = Readiness %, Red line = ACWR Safety Score. Wider shape indicates better overall athlete condition.

dataPolicy.title: Athlete Hub - Data Privacy Policy
dataPolicy.introduction: This policy explains how Athlete Hub collects, uses, and protects your personal and sensitive data. We are transparent about every aspect of data processing, including the use of JWT technology for secure authentication.
dataPolicy.encryptionDesc: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest
dataPolicy.jwtSecureDesc: Signed tokens with short expiration times
dataPolicy.gdprComplianceDesc: We respect GDPR and privacy laws
dataPolicy.contactDpo: You can contact us for any questions about privacy or to exercise your rights.
dataPolicy.authDesc: Used to verify your identity and allow secure access to the platform
dataPolicy.passwordDesc: Hashed with Argon2 (never in plain text)
dataPolicy.personalDataDesc: To personalize your experience and show you relevant data for your sport
dataPolicy.healthDataDesc: These are sensitive data protected by special regulations
dataPolicy.athleticTestsDesc: Results of performance tests (jumps, speed, etc.)
dataPolicy.injuryDataDesc: Type, severity, date and duration of injuries
dataPolicy.specialConsentDesc: You gave your explicit consent to process this sensitive data during registration
dataPolicy.usageDataDesc: To improve security, debug problems and understand how you use the platform
dataPolicy.timestampDesc: Date and time of your accesses and actions
dataPolicy.pagesVisitedDesc: Which sections of the app you use
dataPolicy.jwtExplanation: JWT (JSON Web Token) is an international security standard we use to verify your identity without storing the password in the session.
dataPolicy.step1Desc: The browser sends credentials to the server in encrypted form (HTTPS)
dataPolicy.step2Desc: The server checks if the password matches the stored hash (never sees the password)
dataPolicy.step3Desc: If correct, the server creates a digitally signed JWT with expiration (15 minutes)
dataPolicy.step4Desc: The JWT is sent to the browser and stored in localStorage
dataPolicy.step5Desc: Each request includes the JWT in the Authorization header
dataPolicy.jwtBenefitsDesc: Stateless (server doesn't store sessions), secure (digitally signed), scalable (works well in distributed environments) and standard for modern web applications
dataPolicy.serviceDeliveryDesc: We store and organize your training, performance and health data to let you track your progress over time.
dataPolicy.analyticsDesc: We use aggregated and anonymized data to identify trends, improve features and create better training plans.
dataPolicy.securityDesc: We monitor access logs to detect suspicious activity, hacking and unauthorized use of your account.
dataPolicy.communicationsDesc: If you opted to receive newsletters or notifications, we use your data to send you relevant updates and personalized advice.
dataPolicy.legalDesc: If required by law, we may disclose your data to competent authorities (e.g. police requests).
dataPolicy.httpsDesc: All data in transit is encrypted end-to-end
dataPolicy.encryptionAtRestDesc: Sensitive data in the database is encrypted
dataPolicy.passwordHashingDesc: We use Argon2 (algorithm resistant to brute force)
dataPolicy.jwtSignedDesc: JWTs are digitally signed and cannot be altered
dataPolicy.httpOnlyCookiesDesc: Refresh Token is stored in HttpOnly cookie (inaccessible from JavaScript)
dataPolicy.corsConfiguredDesc: Only authorized domains can access the APIs
dataPolicy.rateLimitingDesc: Protection against brute force and DoS attacks
dataPolicy.auditLoggingDesc: All important accesses are logged for security checks
dataPolicy.monitoringDesc: Automatic systems monitor suspicious activity in real-time
dataPolicy.responsibilityDesc: Don't share your password with anyone. If you suspect unauthorized access, immediately change your password or contact us.
dataPolicy.gdprArticle6a: 6(1)(a): Explicit consent of the data subject
dataPolicy.gdprArticle9a: 9(2)(a): Explicit consent of the data subject (you consented during registration)
dataPolicy.dataRetention: How Long We Keep Your Data
dataPolicy.retentionNote: When you delete your account, your personal data is deleted immediately, but backups may temporarily retain encrypted data for security reasons.
dataPolicy.userRightsIntro: Based on European GDPR and privacy laws, you have the following rights
dataPolicy.rightOfAccessDesc: You can request a copy of all our data about you. We'll send you a CSV file with all your information within 30 days.
dataPolicy.rightOfRectificationDesc: If your data is inaccurate or incomplete, you can request correction. You can also correct many data directly in your profile.
dataPolicy.rightToBeForget: Right to Erasure / Right to be Forgotten (Art. 17 GDPR)
dataPolicy.rightToBeForgetDesc: You can request complete deletion of your account and all personal data. This will happen within 30 days, unless there are legal retention obligations.
dataPolicy.rightToPortabilityDesc: You can request your data in a standard format (e.g. JSON or CSV) to transfer to another platform.
dataPolicy.rightToRestriction: Right to Restriction of Processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
dataPolicy.rightToRestrictionDesc: You can request that we limit the processing of your data while we verify a dispute or complaint.
dataPolicy.rightToObjectDesc: You can object to the processing of your data, especially for marketing and communications. You can manage preferences in your profile.
dataPolicy.rightToAutomatedDecisionsDesc: We do not use machine learning algorithms to make significant decisions about you. Any analysis is informative, not binding.
dataPolicy.exerciseRightsDesc: Send a written request to our DPO (Data Protection Officer) at the email address
dataPolicy.exerciseRightsNote: Specify clearly which right you want to exercise (access, rectification, deletion, etc.) and provide identifiers to verify your identity.
dataPolicy.dataSharingIntro: Your data is NOT sold to third parties. We share it only when strictly necessary
dataPolicy.emailDesc: Resend, SendGrid (to send you notifications and password reset)
dataPolicy.dpaNoteDesc: We have Data Processing Agreements (DPA) with all providers to ensure they don't use your data for their own purposes.
dataPolicy.protectRights: To protect rights, privacy and security of people and resources
dataPolicy.acquisition: In case of business acquisition (data transfer to new owner)
dataPolicy.authTokenCookieDesc: HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict - Necessary to keep you logged in
dataPolicy.themeCookieDesc: localStorage - Remembers if you prefer dark or light theme
dataPolicy.noTrackingDesc: Tracking pixels, Google Analytics, or retargeting systems. We believe in the privacy of our users.
dataPolicy.contactPrivacyDesc: If you have questions about this policy or privacy
dataPolicy.responseTime: We will respond within 5 business days.
dataPolicy.complaintToAuthorityDesc: If you believe your privacy is not being respected, you have the right to file a complaint with the competent authority (Data Protection Authority)
dataPolicy.footer: This policy is legally binding. If you do not accept these terms, you cannot use Athlete Hub.

hero.subtitle: MVP 1.0.2 Open for Early Adopters
hero.title: ELITE DATA FOR ELITE ATHLETES.
hero.description: Athlete Hub transforms the complexity of athletic preparation into an intuitive, secure, and scientifically rigorous dashboard.

features.descPrecisioneACWR: Scientific monitoring of acute vs chronic load ratio.
features.descFeedbackLoop: Total automation of RPE collection via email.
features.descPianificazione: Manage multi-athlete sessions with defined targets.
features.descClinicalData: Centralized hub for injuries and Return To Play protocols.

scalability.title: BUILT FOR EXTREME SCALABILITY.
scalability.description: We use Nuxt 3 and encrypted databases to ensure your athletes' data is always accessible, fast, and secure.
scalability.dataIntegrityDesc: Automated hourly backups and cloud sync.
